headline: Micron surges 13% on blowout earnings
detail: Micron's results confirm explosive AI-driven memory demand, which is a direct positive read-through for the chip sector broadly. This gives SMH a tailwind and validates staying in semiconductor exposure, but your other chip names haven't rallied with it yet - watch whether the enthusiasm spreads.

headline: Apple drops 5% on memory crunch price hikes
detail: Apple hiking MacBook and iPad prices because memory is too expensive and scarce is a warning shot for the whole tech supply chain. This kind of cost pressure can squeeze margins across your tech names, particularly AVGO which is deep in the AI/networking chip stack that feeds into these same supply dynamics.
